title: helichrysum citrispinum var. citrispinum
intro: Helichrysum citrispinum var. citrispinum is a plant species commonly known as the Yellow Everlasting or Yellow Gum, belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Helichrysum citrispinum var. citrispinum include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support digestive health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
